author: kxwu222
description: Bring Xiaomi MiMo into your sidebar as an AI assistant! - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: kxwu222
manifest.description: Chat with Xiaomi MiMo AI from your vault sidebar. Supports inline editing with diff preview, prompt tuning, MCP tool use, conversation history, multi-tab sessions, and image attachments.
manifest.name: MiMo
